repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition: row-space identification/partial-identification trichotomy is the closest in-catalogue linear-algebra analogue; ExactID/PartialID API catalogue is otherwise empty

published_prior_art.cite: Santos2011JoE, ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL, BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT: linear functionals can be identified when nuisance bridge/structural functions are not

repo_prior_art.cite: none; pid_mediation_proxy and eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator concern proxy sharpness/envelopes, not proximal regularizer invariance

published_prior_art.cite: BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT + ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL cover strong functional identification and weak/nonunique nuisances, but not the stated finite SPD-selector iff diagnostic

repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue ExactID/PartialID entry characterizes SPD bridge-selector selection ranges

published_prior_art.cite: none; closest BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT notes penalization-determined nuisance limits but does not characterize the ATE selection range inside a proximal sharp interval

repo_prior_art.cite: none; closest proxy entries are pid_mediation_proxy and eid_frontdoor_multi_mediator but neither gives a two-by-two proximal regularization witness

published_prior_art.cite: none; MiaoGengTchetgen2018Biometrika and ShiMiaoNelsonTchetgen2020JRSSB use finite/categorical proxy structures for point identification, not a regularizer-dependent finite witness

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The null-annihilator criterion is already the finite version of the published strong-functional-identification/nonunique-bridge phenomenon in Santos2011JoE, ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023SPL, and BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023COLT; keep it as support, not novelty.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the current common exact-fiber SPD-selector assumption turns the named-workflow frontier into generic finite convex/linear algebra; flagship repair needs two specific published estimators in their native objectives and a sharp observable equivalence/non-equivalence threshold without assuming both already reduce to the same Q-selector.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Recast Conjectures 1-2 as an actual estimator-frontier theorem between named Cui proximal OR/IPW/DR and Kallus-Mao-Uehara minimax estimators, with their native population objectives and a threshold computable before imposing the shared exact-fiber quadratic reduction.
Move Theorem 1 out of the novelty payload or explicitly label it a support proposition, then make the main novelty solely the selection-range/equivalence frontier.

Add a comparison to minimal-bridge regularization work such as Imbens-Kallus-Mao 2021 and explain why its many-bridges/same-effect regularized target does not subsume the proposed penalty-dependent proximal ATE regime.

For Conjecture 3, complete the observable-law witness by giving explicit positive cell masses and conditional outcome means realizing the displayed T and m matrices, so the nondegeneracy claim is auditable at proposal level.

recommended_next_step: Revise around the tier gap: either strengthen the native-estimator equivalence frontier to flagship axis (b), or lower the novelty target to field.
